issues.title: Graph Connector Deployment Fails for Azure Data Lake
issues.description: The Graph Connector fails to deploy properly when linked to Azure Data Lake, showing a configuration mismatch error.

issues.title: Microsoft Copilot Suggestion Latency
issues.description: Copilot takes too long to generate suggestions when working with large enterprise datasets, causing workflow interruptions.

issues.title: Error Handling Missing in Graph Connector APIs
issues.description: APIs lack proper error handling mechanisms, leading to unclear error messages during data source connection failures.

issues.title: Unsupported Data Format in Graph Connector Sync
issues.description: Certain file formats, like legacy XML, are not supported during the data synchronization process.

issues.title: Access Token Fails to Refresh
issues.description: The system fails to refresh OAuth tokens, causing connectivity issues between the Graph Connector and Microsoft 365 APIs.

issues.title: Microsoft Copilot Misinterprets Query Context
issues.description: Copilot suggestions are irrelevant due to an inability to properly interpret the user’s natural language query.

issues.title: Duplicate Data Entries in Graph Connector Index
issues.description: Graph Connector creates duplicate entries in the index due to incorrect deduplication logic during updates.

issues.title: Permissions Misalignment with Graph Connector
issues.description: Graph Connector inherits incorrect user permissions, blocking certain groups from accessing essential data.

issues.title: Inconsistent Data Sync Across Tenants
issues.description: Data synchronization fails to maintain consistency across multiple tenants using shared connectors.

issues.title: Error Logging Mechanism Fails for Graph Connector
issues.description: Graph Connector does not log errors correctly, making it difficult to troubleshoot deployment issues.

issues.title: Microsoft Copilot Suggests Incorrect Syntax
issues.description: Copilot suggests incorrect syntax when generating SQL queries for relational database connections.

issues.title: Slow Data Query Execution in Graph
issues.description: Complex queries against large datasets lead to unacceptably high response times in Graph Connector APIs.

issues.title: Graph API Version Incompatibility
issues.description: Applications fail to function due to mismatches between the Graph API version used in the connector and the system requirements.

issues.title: Unsupported Source Authentication Protocols
issues.description: Certain enterprise authentication protocols are not supported by the Graph Connector, preventing integration.

issues.title: Copilot Training Data Outdated
issues.description: Copilot fails to provide relevant suggestions because its training dataset does not reflect the latest API updates.

issues.title: Graph Connector Crashes on Large Data Sync
issues.description: Connector crashes while attempting to process large datasets, suggesting memory allocation issues.

issues.title: User Role Misconfiguration in Graph Connector
issues.description: Incorrect role assignments result in restricted access to essential features for certain users.

issues.title: Copilot Fails to Interpret Multi-Language Codebase
issues.description: Copilot generates incorrect suggestions when dealing with projects using multiple programming languages.

issues.title: Data Mapping Errors Between Source and Graph
issues.description: Incorrect mappings between source fields and Graph schema lead to data inconsistency issues.

issues.title: Unexpected Null Values in Graph Query Results
issues.description: Queries against the Graph API return unexpected null values, disrupting dependent applications.

issues.title: Graph Connector Deployment Times Out
issues.description: Deploying the connector exceeds the timeout threshold for initialization, causing system-level failures.

issues.title: Unsupported File Types in Copilot Integration
issues.description: Copilot is unable to analyze and generate suggestions for proprietary or unsupported file formats.

issues.title: Data Loss During Incremental Sync
issues.description: Incremental synchronization with the Graph Connector results in partial data loss from the source.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Deprecated APIs
issues.description: Generated code suggestions use APIs that are no longer supported, leading to runtime errors.

issues.title: Network Latency Affects Graph Connector Performance
issues.description: High network latency causes delays in data synchronization between the source and Microsoft Graph.

issues.title: Copilot Overwrites Custom Code Segments
issues.description: Generated code suggestions overwrite developer-customized logic, resulting in functional regressions.

issues.title: API Rate Limits Cause Data Sync Failures
issues.description: Frequent API requests hit rate limits, halting the synchronization process for the Graph Connector.

issues.title: Graph Connector Misinterprets Boolean Fields
issues.description: Boolean fields in the data source are misinterpreted, causing errors during synchronization.

issues.title: Slow Copilot Response with Complex Prompts
issues.description: Copilot's suggestion engine struggles with complex or nested code prompts, delaying user workflow.

issues.title: Graph Connector Overloads System Resources
issues.description: Excessive resource consumption during sync operations causes server slowdowns and system crashes.

issues.title: Misaligned Time Zones in Graph Data Sync
issues.description: Data synchronization fails to account for time zone differences, leading to timestamp inconsistencies.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Non-Optimal Algorithms
issues.description: Generated solutions lack optimization, resulting in inefficient and slow-performing code.

issues.title: Data Validation Rules Ignored During Sync
issues.description: The Graph Connector bypasses validation rules, resulting in corrupted or invalid data in the destination.

issues.title: Unsupported OAuth Scopes in Authentication
issues.description: Required OAuth scopes for data access are not supported by the Graph Connector, blocking connectivity.

issues.title: Graph Query Cache Fails to Refresh
issues.description: Cached query results are not refreshed as expected, leading to outdated information being retrieved.

issues.title: Incomplete Documentation for Copilot API
issues.description: Developers face difficulties integrating Copilot due to incomplete or outdated documentation.

issues.title: System Fails to Reconnect After Network Loss
issues.description: Graph Connector does not automatically reconnect after a temporary network failure.

issues.title: Copilot Misinterprets Ambiguous Comments
issues.description: Ambiguous comments in the codebase result in incorrect suggestions from Copilot.

issues.title: Data Encryption Errors in Graph Sync
issues.description: Encryption keys are mismatched during synchronization, causing data transfer errors.

issues.title: Graph Connector Fails on Real-Time Updates
issues.description: The connector fails to process real-time data updates from dynamic sources, leading to outdated information in the Graph index.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Deprecated Data Structures
issues.description: Copilot-generated code includes data structures that are no longer efficient or recommended for modern applications.

issues.title: Connector Lacks Retry Mechanism for API Calls
issues.description: Failed API calls are not retried, leading to frequent data synchronization interruptions.

issues.title: Incorrect Handling of Date Formats in Sync
issues.description: Graph Connector misinterprets date formats from certain locales, causing errors in data alignment.

issues.title: Copilot Overloads Logs with Debug Messages
issues.description: Debug-level messages from Copilot suggestions overwhelm logging systems, making issue tracking difficult.

issues.title: Graph Connector Drops Large Attachments
issues.description: Attachments exceeding a certain size limit are dropped without warning during data synchronization.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Hardcoded Credentials
issues.description: Security issues arise as Copilot suggests using hardcoded credentials in generated code.

issues.title: Graph Sync Fails on Nested Data Structures
issues.description: The connector is unable to handle nested data structures, resulting in incomplete synchronization.

issues.title: Authentication Tokens Not Revoked After Logout
issues.description: Tokens remain active even after users log out, creating potential security vulnerabilities.

issues.title: Graph Connector Ignores Indexed Column Limits
issues.description: The connector attempts to index columns exceeding allowed limits, resulting in synchronization errors.

issues.title: Copilot Misinterprets AI Model Prompts
issues.description: Suggestions fail when prompts include advanced AI model configurations, leading to non-functional code.

issues.title: Connector Does Not Support Multi-Factor Authentication
issues.description: Integration with systems requiring multi-factor authentication fails due to lack of connector support.

issues.title: Data Sync Conflicts from Parallel Operations
issues.description: Running multiple sync operations in parallel causes conflicts and inconsistent data states.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Inefficient Memory Usage
issues.description: Generated solutions fail to optimize memory usage, impacting performance in resource-limited environments.

issues.title: Connector Errors on Nested Permissions
issues.description: Permissions for nested data structures are not respected, causing access control issues.

issues.title: Copilot Struggles with Sparse Documentation
issues.description: Incomplete documentation in the codebase leads to irrelevant or incorrect suggestions from Copilot.

issues.title: Graph Connector Ignores Incremental Updates
issues.description: Incremental updates from the source are ignored, forcing full re-synchronizations each time.

issues.title: Connector Does Not Validate Source Integrity
issues.description: Data from unreliable sources is not validated, leading to potential corruption in the Graph index.

issues.title: Copilot Fails on Large Monolithic Codebases
issues.description: Code suggestions become less relevant and slower as the project size increases significantly.

issues.title: Connector Ignores Case Sensitivity in Queries
issues.description: Case-insensitive queries cause data mismatches when interacting with case-sensitive data sources.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Deprecated Language Features
issues.description: Suggestions use language features that are no longer supported in newer runtime environments.

issues.title: Graph Connector Incompatible with Legacy Systems
issues.description: Legacy systems cannot integrate with the Graph Connector due to outdated protocol support.

issues.title: Data Filtering Rules Ignored During Sync
issues.description: Predefined filtering rules are bypassed, resulting in irrelevant or excessive data being synchronized.

issues.title: Copilot Fails to Respect Project-Specific Conventions
issues.description: Suggestions do not align with coding conventions defined in the project, causing inconsistencies.

issues.title: Graph Connector Performance Degrades Over Time
issues.description: Long-term use of the connector results in degraded performance due to inefficient resource cleanup.

issues.title: Sync Errors on High-Latency Networks
issues.description: The connector is unable to handle high-latency network environments, leading to frequent timeouts.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Conflicting Design Patterns
issues.description: Generated code contains design patterns that conflict with the existing project architecture.

issues.title: Graph Connector Ignores API Throttling Guidelines
issues.description: Excessive API calls from the connector exceed throttling limits, causing service disruptions.

issues.title: Copilot Fails to Understand Custom Frameworks
issues.description: Suggestions are irrelevant when working with custom or niche frameworks not included in training data.

issues.title: Connector Does Not Support Regional Settings
issues.description: The connector fails to adapt to regional settings, such as currency or number formats, causing sync errors.

issues.title: Copilot Generates Excessive Boilerplate Code
issues.description: Generated suggestions include unnecessary boilerplate, increasing code complexity unnecessarily.

issues.title: Graph Sync Breaks on Schema Changes
issues.description: Schema updates in the source system lead to synchronization failures due to lack of adaptability.

issues.title: Copilot Struggles with Dynamic Imports
issues.description: Suggestions fail when working with projects that utilize dynamic imports or runtime module resolution.

issues.title: Connector Logs Sensitive Data
issues.description: Sensitive information is inadvertently logged during connector operations, posing a security risk.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Unhandled Edge Cases
issues.description: Generated solutions fail to account for edge cases, leading to runtime errors in production.

issues.title: Graph Connector Does Not Support Cloud Failover
issues.description: When a cloud failover occurs, the connector does not gracefully handle the transition, disrupting operations.

issues.title: Copilot Fails with Modular Monorepos
issues.description: Generated suggestions are incomplete when working with large modular monorepositories.

issues.title: Graph Connector Reindexes Unnecessarily
issues.description: The connector frequently reindexes unchanged data, leading to wasted resources and time.

issues.title: Copilot Generates Unsafe Concurrent Code
issues.description: Suggestions include unsafe handling of concurrency, resulting in potential race conditions.

issues.title: Graph Connector Schema Validation Fails
issues.description: The data schema provided does not match the expected schema, causing validation to fail during deployment.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Incomplete Function Signatures
issues.description: Generated function suggestions miss required parameters, leading to runtime errors in production.

issues.title: Graph Connector Sync Ignores Incremental Changes
issues.description: The sync operation processes the entire dataset instead of detecting and updating only changed records.

issues.title: Data Source Authentication Policy Mismatch
issues.description: Authentication policies between the Graph Connector and the data source conflict, causing connection issues.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Vulnerable Code Patterns
issues.description: Generated code includes practices that introduce security vulnerabilities, such as SQL injection risks.

issues.title: Graph Connector Loses Connectivity to Hybrid Cloud
issues.description: Intermittent connectivity issues disrupt synchronization between on-premise systems and cloud data sources.

issues.title: Timeout During Graph Query Execution
issues.description: Complex Graph queries fail to execute within the allowed time, disrupting dependent applications.

issues.title: Graph Connector Fails to Process Nested Data
issues.description: The connector encounters errors when processing deeply nested data structures from the source.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Deprecated Libraries
issues.description: Copilot recommendations include libraries that are no longer maintained, increasing the risk of compatibility issues.

issues.title: Misconfigured Webhook in Graph Connector
issues.description: Webhook settings are improperly configured, resulting in missed event triggers during data sync.

issues.title: Graph API Filters Return Incorrect Results
issues.description: Filters applied in Graph API queries do not yield the expected dataset, leading to incorrect results.

issues.title: Copilot Overuses Recursion in Suggestions
issues.description: Generated code relies heavily on recursion, causing performance issues with large datasets.

issues.title: Graph Connector Skips Data Validation Rules
issues.description: The sync process bypasses important validation rules, introducing inaccurate records into the system.

issues.title: Graph Connector Ignores Proxy Settings
issues.description: The connector does not respect proxy configurations, resulting in network errors during deployment.

issues.title: Copilot Fails to Parse Legacy Code
issues.description: Suggestions generated for legacy codebases are incompatible with the existing project structure.

issues.title: Graph Connector Logging Overload
issues.description: Excessive logging during data sync operations consumes system resources and degrades performance.

issues.title: Data Retention Policy Misalignment
issues.description: Graph Connector does not enforce source system data retention policies, leading to compliance issues.

issues.title: Graph Connector Misconfigures Index Priorities
issues.description: Index prioritization does not reflect the expected order, resulting in slower search performance.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Poorly Documented Code
issues.description: Generated suggestions lack adequate comments or documentation, making the code difficult to maintain.

issues.title: Graph Connector Cache Eviction Fails
issues.description: Cached entries are not properly evicted, leading to outdated data being retrieved from the Graph Connector.

issues.title: Copilot Misinterprets Design Patterns
issues.description: Recommendations do not align with established design patterns, leading to inconsistent code structures.

issues.title: Data Source Encoding Mismatch
issues.description: Encoding mismatches between the data source and the Graph Connector cause synchronization failures.

issues.title: Unsupported Graph Connector Deployment Environment
issues.description: The selected deployment environment lacks required dependencies for the Graph Connector.

issues.title: Data Loss in Partial Sync Failures
issues.description: Partial synchronization failures result in incomplete data transfer to the Graph Connector index.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Inefficient Loop Structures
issues.description: Generated code relies on inefficient loop structures, negatively impacting runtime performance.

issues.title: Graph API Throttling Affects Real-Time Operations
issues.description: Excessive API calls trigger throttling, delaying real-time data operations through the Graph Connector.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Excessive Dependencies
issues.description: Recommendations include unnecessary third-party dependencies, increasing project bloat.

issues.title: Graph Connector Fails on Conditional Logic
issues.description: Complex conditional logic in the source system is not properly replicated during synchronization.

issues.title: Copilot Omits Edge Cases in Suggested Code
issues.description: Generated solutions fail to account for edge cases, leading to potential runtime errors.

issues.title: Graph Connector Overwrites Critical Metadata
issues.description: Synchronization processes unintentionally overwrite essential metadata fields in the destination system.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Redundant Code Blocks
issues.description: Code suggestions include unnecessary redundancy, complicating maintenance efforts.

issues.title: Graph API Pagination Errors
issues.description: Errors in handling paginated results lead to incomplete data retrieval during API calls.

issues.title: Copilot Struggles with Event-Driven Architectures
issues.description: Suggestions fail to integrate well into event-driven systems, causing unexpected behavior.

issues.title: Graph Connector Ignores User Locale Settings
issues.description: Locale settings are not respected, leading to incorrect date and number formatting in the synchronized data.

issues.title: Data Schema Evolution Not Supported
issues.description: Changes in the source data schema are not automatically detected, causing synchronization errors.

issues.title: Copilot Generates Overly Verbose Code
issues.description: Recommendations are unnecessarily verbose, complicating readability and debugging.

issues.title: Graph Connector Fails During High-Concurrency Operations
issues.description: Simultaneous synchronization jobs result in deadlocks and system crashes.

issues.title: Copilot Suggests Non-Standard Naming Conventions
issues.description: Generated suggestions do not follow project-specific naming standards, causing inconsistencies.
